modelIdentification.name: JLVC-Alerts
modelIdentification.purpose: JLVC-Alerts provides components neccessary to support federates sending and receiving alerts based on errors and notifications.
modelIdentification.description: This FOM module contains the objects and interactions used for reporting alerts from federates and violations of JLVC Federation rules.
modelIdentification.useHistory: JLVC2025 - Initial draft of JLVC-Alerts module
JLVC2025 - Version 2: In ScenarioViolationVariantStruct, changed the dataType of MissingEmitterType to EmitterNameEnum16.
JLVC2025 - Version 3: Updated the order of dataType groupings in the module to be compliant with schema.
JLVC2026 - Version 4: Updated reference dependencies to use the new RPRv3 module names.

reference.identification: SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Base FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Enumerations FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Foundation FOM Module

parameter.name: SourceFederateName
parameter.semantics: Federate name of the JECS federate generating the alert.

interactionClass.name: ScenarioAlert
interactionClass.semantics: Notification that data being published in the federation violates rules regarding the scenario (OBS) data.

parameter.name: ObjectIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Object whose published attribute(s) violate the scenario rules.

parameter.name: ScenarioViolation
parameter.semantics: The type of violation and the data value causing the violation.

variantRecordData.name: ScenarioViolationVariantStruct

alternative.name: MissingLvcid
alternative.semantics: The LVCID which cannot be found in the scenario.

alternative.name: MissingEnumeration
alternative.semantics: The enumeration that cannot be found in the scenario.

alternative.name: MissingEmitterType
alternative.semantics: Enumeration of the emitter name that cannot be found in the scenario.

alternative.name: MissingSuperior
alternative.semantics: The superior LVCID that cannot be found in the scenario.

alternative.name: DuplicateLvcid
alternative.semantics: The LVCID that is duplicated in the federation.

variantRecordData.semantics: Which rule is violated and the key info triggering the violation.
